title: sticherus gaenslyi
intro: Sticherus gaenslyi, also known as the rattan fern or rattan palm, is a type of plant belonging to the family Marattiaceae, which is a group of ancient and primitive ferns. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sticherus gaenslyi include its potential to reduce pain, improve digestion, and lower cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in traditional remedies such as ointments and salves.
